title: Spreading Void
description: The Void is spreading into the overworld... So you harvest it.
body:
The void is spreading into the overworld... So you harvest it. Collect void blocks to make OP weapons and armour.

# What does this mod add?

This mod adds Void as blocks to add more op tools and weapons which minecraft definitely needs ** *Cough Cough netherite exists Cough* ** but it is extremely expensive.

# Why was this mod made?

I was bored.

# Why play this mod?

I know you want extremely op items to grind in minecraft you hardcore addict... So I gave you that know you have something more to do before getting bored again and calling minecraft easy.

# Compatibility

This mod will work with other mods (I think).


As the creator I give full permission to every one to do whatever they want with the mod if i get tagged or am mensioned as the mods orignal creator, have fun :)
